craigslist.geocode_query: 3025 Del Rio Dr, Seminole Belleair Bluffs
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Welcome home to Belleair Bluffs! This beautiful house on a cul-de-sac sits on a very large fenced lot only minutes to the beach and the Belleair Causeway Boat Ramp. The property has been well maintained with neutral colors throughout. Enjoy the small town feel of Belleair Bluffs with the seasonal events held at Town Hall. Take the kids to the playground located just a short walk down the street with plenty of shade from mature oaks. The house has solar panels that have been sized to eliminate the electric bill. Large lot with lawn service provided at no extra charge. Located on the other side of the nearby boat ramp is a dog beach and a perfect place to launch your kayak / canoe. There are so many amenities for this location, you will love exploring the locally owned shops and fine dining. Ride your bike up the Pinellas trail or just have a relaxing day on the backyard deck. Call / text today to set up your viewing! First month's rent and security deposit required for move in. Tenant responsible for electric above what solar panels produce and other utilities. $40 application fee per adult. $250 non-refundable pet deposit per pet with an additional $20 per pet per month added to rent.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Park East is a community that truly has it all. Built along the edge of a beautiful pond, our luxury 1 and 2 bedroom apartments feature the best of living near the city and having a quiet, naturally wooded environment to call home. At Park East, you will be minutes away from all the offerings of Lutz, New Tampa, Tampa Palms and Temple Terrace. Our centrally located community is down the street from AdventHealth, BayCare, Moffitt, The University of South Florida, USAA, The VA, and some of Tampa’s premiere coffeeshops, music venues, and restaurants. There is convenient access to I-275 for a quick drive to Downtown Tampa. Have a special 4-legged friend in your family? Well we are pet-friendly! The Shenandoah floorplan is available now with an amazing discount of $1365 a month for a 12 month lease! This move-in special takes $200 off the standard market rate of $1565, saving you $2400 in rent over the course of your 12 month lease! This spacious 2 bed 1 bath apartment home features your own private balcony with beautiful views of our manicured landscape, extraordinary walk-in closets, a luxurious fireplace, and vaulted ceilings. Washer and dryer hookups are conveniently included in-unit. Some of the many amenities you can enjoy at our gated community include: * Relaxing Community Pool * Fitness Center with TVs * Indoor Basketball Court * On-Site Laundry Center * Clubhouse with Wi-Fi * Billiard Room * BBQ Grilling Station and Picnic Area * Dog Park * 24- Hour Emergency Maintenance * Beautiful Natural Landscape * Private Carports Available * Easy Online Rent Payment The Shenandoah floorplan is available now for move in for as low as $1365 a month for a 12 month lease! Start your application today to reserve this beautiful unit! If you’re ready to see your new home, call us to schedule a tour! Showings are available Monday through Saturday. Please call us if you have any questions about the application process or requirements.
